content.html:
Key Competencies

Core strengths developed across research, data-intensive engineering, and production-grade problem solving.

items: Advanced statistical modeling, simulation thinking, and predictive reasoning.
Strong background in physical modeling and high-dimensional data interpretation.
14+ years solving complex scientific and computational problems.
Translating physical intuition into robust, data-driven solutions.
Designing reliable data workflows from ingestion to validated outputs.
Automation-oriented mindset for scalable and repeatable operations.
End-to-end ownership from data preparation to deployment and monitoring.
Emphasis on reproducibility, traceability, and maintainable model operations.
Cross-functional collaboration with engineering, science, and domain teams.
Clear communication of technical insights to mixed technical and non-technical audiences.
Programming: Python, SQL, C, Fortran.
Versioning and collaboration: Git, GitHub, Dagshub.
Engineering environment: Linux, API development and service integration.
Data and visualization stack for analysis and reporting.
Data orchestration and workflow scheduling in production settings.
Cloud and platform fundamentals.
Molecular simulation setup, execution, and analysis workflows.
Scientific visualization and trajectory interrogation.
Statistical and numerical computing for model validation.
Computational electrostatics and interface-focused analysis methods.
Experiment-linked data interpretation for publishable scientific outputs.
English: professional working proficiency.
German: B1-B2 (actively improving toward C1).
Persian: native.
Kurdish: native.
